title: generates corrupted cpp code with scoping failure
body:
In regressions of cases from the SystemVerilog LRM, legal case on 1800-2012 page 176 (or 1800-2023 page 227) errors out:

error: ‘unnamedblk1__DOT___Vwrapped_unnamedblk2_2__DOT____VDynScope_unnamedblk2_2’ was not declared in this scope

**Code:**
```
initial begin
    for( int j = 1; j <= 3; ++j )
      fork
        automatic int k = j;
  	    #k $write( "%0d", k );
        begin
          automatic int m = j;
        end
      join_none
end
```

**Version:**
5.044

**Environment:**
Centos 7.9，GCC 11.5
